title: Bachelor of Information Technology (S.Kom.)
description: Pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Informatics at one of Indonesia's leading technology-focused universities. Building deep expertise in software engineering, system architecture, and AI — with a strong emphasis on real-world, product-driven learning.
highlights: Focus: AI, System Architecture & Software Engineering

title: Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) — Penetration Testing Training
description: Undergoing structured professional training in ethical hacking and penetration testing under the globally recognized CEH framework. Developing hands-on competency in identifying, exploiting, and remediating security vulnerabilities across modern systems.

title: Full-Stack JavaScript Web Developer Training
description: Completed an intensive full-stack web development training program, covering modern JavaScript ecosystems from frontend to backend — including React, Node.js, and database integration.

title: CEO & Project Manager — Software House Startup
description: Founded and currently leading a software house startup with a lean team of 4, providing end-to-end digital solutions including web applications, mobile apps, and custom systems for clients across various industries. Responsible for business strategy, client relations, project scoping, and overall technical direction.
highlights: Web, mobile & custom systems on demand

title: Vice Chairman — UMN Programming Club
description: Serving as Vice Chairman of the UMN Programming Club, collaborating with the executive board (BPH) to drive the club's vision and organize flagship annual events — including an internal competitive programming contest open to all UMN students, and the Awarding Night as the celebratory grand finale.

title: Finalist — Garuda Hacks 6.0
description: Competed in Garuda Hacks 6.0, one of Indonesia's most prestigious hackathons, as part of a collaborative team. Built LeftOver — an AI-powered food rescue marketplace — over the course of the event, and advanced to the Finalist stage in recognition of the solution's innovation and real-world impact.

title: Top 6 Finalist — UMN × CIMB Niaga Project Collaboration
description: Led the project as Project Manager for a university-industry collaboration between UMN and CIMB Niaga. The team successfully delivered a comprehensive project proposal and achieved a Top 6 Finalist placement — recognized for strategic thinking, structured project management, and the quality of the final deliverable.

title: Founder — Reed Diffuser Business
description: Independently founded and operated a premium home fragrance business specializing in reed diffusers. Managed the full business cycle — from product curation and branding to multi-channel sales and customer engagement — across Instagram, WhatsApp, and TikTok Shop.
highlights: Multi-channel sales: Instagram, WhatsApp, TikTok Shop

title: Founder — Custom & Designed Clothing Brand
description: Founded a fashion micro-brand together with a business partner — originating the concept and driving its execution — offering self-designed and custom-printed apparel. Handled brand identity, product design, and sales operations through Instagram and WhatsApp, building a loyal customer base through personalized offerings.

title: Founder — Custom Phone Case Business
description: Launched a solo entrepreneurial venture at age 15 during the COVID-19 pandemic while in Grade 9 of junior high school. Designed, sourced, and sold custom phone cases to peers and online customers via Instagram and WhatsApp — demonstrating early commercial initiative and self-sufficiency under challenging circumstances.
